data.body: FINDINGS: Worktree isolation verification results — (1) CONFIRMED: git rev-parse --show-toplevel returns a distinct path for a worktree vs the parent repo. A worktree created in /tmp produces a different --show-toplevel than the parent REPO_ROOT. (2) CONFIRMED: get_artifacts_dir() produces worktree-specific paths. Because it hashes REPO_ROOT to generate /tmp/workflow-plugin-<hash>/, different REPO_ROOT values (parent vs worktree) yield different artifact directories. This means hooks and scripts using get_artifacts_dir() will automatically isolate state per worktree. (3) CONFIRMED: git worktree remove cleanly removes the worktree directory and delists it from git worktree list. (4) LIMITATION: Actual Agent dispatch with isolation:worktree cannot be tested until the guard update (Story fb66-2a96) — this spike only validates the underlying git and artifact-dir mechanics.
